_meta.what: paradigm_terra anchor-body conformance fixtures — Mnemosyne's buildAnchorBody MUST reproduce these byte-for-byte (BoC base64) for the same 32-byte root.
_meta.transport: anchor body cell = op:uint32 (ANCHOR_OP 'PTA1' = 0x50544131) || root:256bit raw
_meta.note: root_hex is the lowercase 64-hex Mnemosyne vault_memory_root (no 0x prefix). Vendored verbatim from terra (spec-compatible, not runtime-coupled), the same way CE v1.3 golden is vendored.
